Class DataRequestRejectedHandler

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.gtnet.handler.AbstractGTNetMessageHandler
grafiosch.gtnet.handler.AbstractResponseHandler
grafiosch.gtnet.handler.impl.DataRequestRejectedHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
GTNetMessageHandler
@Component public class DataRequestRejectedHandler extends AbstractResponseHandler
Handler for GT_NET_DATA_REQUEST_REJECTED_S messages. Processes rejection responses to our data exchange requests. The remote server has declined our request to exchange data (last prices, historical data, etc.). The optional message field may contain the reason for rejection.

  • Field Summary

  • Method Details

    • getSupportedMessageCode

      public GTNetMessageCode getSupportedMessageCode()
      Description copied from interface: GTNetMessageHandler
      Returns the primary message code this handler is responsible for. For handlers supporting multiple codes, this returns the first/primary code. Override GTNetMessageHandler.getSupportedMessageCodes() to register all supported codes.

    • processResponseSideEffects

      protected void processResponseSideEffects(GTNetMessageContext context, GTNetMessage storedMessage)
      Description copied from class: AbstractResponseHandler
      Processes response-specific side effects. Called after the response is stored. Use for operations like:
      • Updating GTNet entity flags based on accept/reject
      • Storing tokens from handshake accept responses
      • Updating server state based on response
      Specified by:
      processResponseSideEffects in class AbstractResponseHandler
      Parameters:
      context - the message context
      storedMessage - the persisted response message
